title: Wonton Bao Italian Fusion
description: A creative twist on traditional bao with wonton and cheesy flavors.
instructions: Cut wonton wrappers into quarters and set aside.
Mix mozzarella cheese with italian seasonings and garlic powder.
Place a wonton quarter on a flat surface and add a sprinkle of cheese mixture.
Brush the edges with olive oil and fold the wonton in half to form a triangle.
Repeat with remaining wrappers and cheese mixture.
Place the wonton bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle pizza sauce over the wonton bites and bake for 12-15 minutes.
